demographics.living_situation: lives at home in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My fingers suddenly went completely dead and white in the cold, and now they are throbbing with an agonizing, burning pain as they turn bright red.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started about an hour ago after I went outside to get the mail in the cold — my fingers went dead and white, then bluish, and now they're bright red and throbbing so badly I can't use my hands. It really frightened me.

symptom_narrative.onset: about one hour ago, right after going outside into the cold evening air to get the mail
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly an hour, now in the painful red throbbing phase
symptom_narrative.character: first my fingers went dead, numb and completely white, then they turned a bluish colour, and now they're bright red, hot, throbbing and burning
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain right now is agonizing — I can't do anything with my hands
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the fingers of both hands, the same on each side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it came on in stages — white, then blue, then red — and the cold set it off
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; I've been rubbing my hands together
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the cold seemed to bring it on
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: numbness and a 'dead finger' feeling earlier, now pins and needles with the pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: not sure I've had it this bad before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't use my hands for anything fiddly right now because of the throbbing pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: get migraines, recently started on a new tablet to prevent them

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a new tablet my doctor started recently to stop migraines

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the house is quite cold and I wasn't dressed warmly enough when I went outside

objective_data_offered.value: both hands' fingers are currently bright red and look warm; earlier they had gone white and then a bluish colour before turning red
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-described / on-camera appearance only; colour and warmth cannot be objectively confirmed and pulses cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: the skin on the fingers looks intact — no black areas, sores or broken skin that the patient can see
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-inspection is not a substitute for a clinician examining perfusion and tissue viability
